headline: A. O. Smith (AOS) – Among the Top 10 Dividend Aristocrat Stocks Ranked by Yield
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 2.5% as of May 29, A. O. Smith Corporation (NYSE:AOS) is included among the Dividend Aristocrats Ranked By Yield: Top 10 Stocks. On May 15, JPMorgan analyst Tomohiko Sano downgraded A. O. Smith Corporation (NYSE:AOS) to Underweight from Neutral and lowered the price target to $60 from $65. The […]
